headline: PayPal's Checkout Recovery: Can Branded TPV Reaccelerate?
summary: PYPL's branded checkout TPV grows 2% in Q1 2026, indicating stabilization as investors watch whether the recovery can build from here.

headline: Robots Will Replace 700,000 Workers
summary: It really doesn’t matter who made the statement if he or she really, really knows what they are talking about. Richard Liu, founder and chair of JD.com, said that “sooner or later” robots would replace 700,000 delivery workers in China. Early experimental versions of this business model are already in place in China, the FT ... Robots Will Replace 700,000 Workers
